name: Banana Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Do not use instant oats.
Use pecans, walnuts, or your choice of nuts, chopped.
Sift together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
Cream sugar and butter (or shortening) until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs,
vanilla, lemon juice, and mashed bananas. Mix well.
Alternate adding rolled oats and nuts to the mixture, stirring after each addition.
Drop dough by teaspoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 15-18 minutes, or until golden brown.
Makes about 6 dozen cookies.
